analysis: The project appears to be a website about black holes with a cosmic theme. The existing files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for multiple versions of the site (test-website, github-page, docs). The current theme likely includes dark backgrounds, cosmic colors, and animations related to black holes. The request is to enhance the UI with a black hole theme, including bulk animated objects, slides, and animated pages.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with additional cosmic animations, such as swirling effects for black holes, glowing particle effects, and smooth transitions for slide animations.
Add more sections to the HTML for animated slides and bulk animated objects, ensuring they are mobile-friendly and interactive.
Implement JavaScript functions to control the animations of black holes, slides, and other cosmic elements, ensuring smooth and responsive interactions.
Include a navigation menu with a hamburger icon for mobile devices, improving usability on smaller screens.
Add Egyptian-themed color palette and UI elements to the CSS, incorporating rich, warm tones and intricate patterns inspired by ancient Egyptian art.
